metric_caveats: This is the full fixed ExECTv2 validation split (40 records), not published ExECTv2 Table 1 reproduction.
These are partial ExECT S3 diagnostics (nine families), not CUI-aware all-family benchmark reproduction.
Pooled micro F1 across nine families is not comparable to frozen S2 five-family headlines.
S2 label-policy bridges from frozen v1.3 are reused for S1 and S2 families; see docs/exect_s3_phase1_overlap_policy.md.
Cap-25 ExECT runs are systematically optimistic vs full validation (~7–9pp on S1); compare cap-25 and full with per-family breakdown, not pooled micro vs S2-only cap-25.
Report per-family F1 and monitor frozen S2 families for regression vs S2 v1.3 full anchor (…231223Z).
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
